description_long: This modern bungalow features a striking dark gabled roof with sharp, angular lines and a spacious, well-manicured lawn surrounding the structure. The front facade is defined by large, symmetrical windows and a central entrance, flanked by lush landscaping and a paved driveway leading to a garage. The rear of the property includes a private backyard with a swimming pool, patio area, and additional greenery, offering ample outdoor living space. The building is set within a fenced perimeter, with a mix of mature trees and decorative rocks providing natural privacy and aesthetic appeal. Multiple cars are parked along the adjacent street, indicating urban integration. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of natural and built elements.
description: A modern, angular-roofed bungalow with large windows, landscaped gardens, and a backyard pool, set within a fenced urban lot.
description_view_0: Oblique view highlighting the front entrance, symmetrical landscaping, and the driveway with parked cars.
description_view_1: Direct front view showing the main entrance, garage, and the full width of the property with cars parked along the street.
description_view_2: Side-rear view emphasizing the angular roof, backyard greenery, and the transition from the street to the private yard.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the backyard pool, patio, and dense tree line providing privacy.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
